creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-04-11 22:34:53 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    astro                Makefile 
  Added files:
    astro/p5-Astro-SIMBAD-Client Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                 pkg-plist 
  Log:
  p5-Astro-SIMBAD-Client  provides an object-oriented interface to
  SIMBAD4. The new SOAP queries are supported, with the object carrying
  default output type and output format, as well as server name on the
  assumption that mirrors will be forthcoming.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Astro-SIMBAD-Client/
  
  PR:             ports/133602
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.133     +1 -0      ports/astro/Makefile
  1.1       +30 -0     ports/astro/p5-Astro-SIMBAD-Client/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/astro/p5-Astro-SIMBAD-Client/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/astro/p5-Astro-SIMBAD-Client/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/astro/p5-Astro-SIMBAD-Client/pkg-plist (new)
